articles.original_title: Billionaire backer sues Trump family's crypto firm over alleged extortion

A2.title: Trump Family in Crypto Trouble
A2.body: A rich man is suing the Trump family. His name is Justin Sun. He is a big investor. He put a lot of money into a crypto company. The company is called World Liberty. It belongs to the Trump family. Justin Sun spent $45 million on tokens from this company. Now he is unhappy. He says the Trump family did something bad to him. He says they used extortion. Extortion is when someone takes money from you by force or by threatening you. Justin Sun is very angry. He wants his money back. He is taking the Trump family to court. The court will decide if the Trump family did anything wrong. This is a big problem for the Trump family. They are famous and rich. But now they have a big trouble. Justin Sun is a big investor. B1.title: Trump Family Crypto Firm Sued
B1.body: A billionaire investor named Justin Sun is taking the Trump family to court. He invested $45 million in their cryptocurrency company, World Liberty. Now, he is suing them for allegedly trying to force him to pay more money. This situation is happening because Justin Sun thinks the Trump family's company did something wrong. He believes they tried to get money from him unfairly. The Trump family's company is involved in cryptocurrency, which is a type of digital money. Justin Sun spent a lot of money on the company's tokens, which are like digital coins. He thought it would be a good investment, but now he is not happy. The case is important because it involves a lot of money and a well-known family. It also shows that investing in cryptocurrency can be risky. Justin Sun wants the court to help him get his money back. He thinks the Trump family's company should not have tried to take more money from him. The court will now decide what happens next. This case is interesting because it involves a billionaire and a famous family. It also shows how important it is to be careful when investing in cryptocurrency. The Trump family's company has not commented on the situation yet. They will likely talk to the court and explain their side of the story. Justin Sun's lawsuit is a big deal because it involves a lot of money. It will be interesting to see what happens next in this case.
